title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MagicBricks South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MagicBricks South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks South Asia Partners family as a Backend Developer in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
